name: Long Context Asset Retrieval
description: Validates that the orchestrator retains foundational brand assets provided early in the conversation and seamlessly uses them in downstream generative tools during later turns.

parts.text: Hi! We are starting a new campaign for Catalyst Shoes. We are promoting the Catalyst Shoes shoes. Here are the approved assets we will use for the entire session. Product: https://storage.googleapis.com/jvidhi-agents/brand_configs/vantus/vantus_jeans.png. Character: https://storage.googleapis.com/jvidhi-agents/brand_configs/vantus/vantus_sweater.png. Logo: https://storage.googleapis.com/jvidhi-agents/brand_configs/vantus/vantus_logo.png.
Great! I have saved those assets for Catalyst Shoes. What would you like to create first?
Actually, before we start, what is our target demographic for this campaign?
Based on Catalyst Shoes, our primary demographic is active young adults interested in outdoor fitness. Would you like to proceed with the campaign generation?

Yes. Please generate a full video ad storyboard completely autonomously now using the assets I sent you earlier. Stop immediately after generating the video batch. Do NOT generate audio, do NOT combine the video, and do NOT evaluate it.
